_doc: Allowlist for yarn audit high/critical advisories that cannot be fixed in the current branch. Every entry needs a reason and a review date. See SUPPLY-CHAIN-SECURITY.md.

_fields.id: npm advisory numeric ID (from `yarn audit --json` advisory.id) — REQUIRED, used for matching
_fields.ghsa: GitHub Security Advisory ID (e.g., GHSA-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx) — for humans, not used for matching
_fields.reason: why the advisory is allowlisted — upstream has no fix, major-version bump deferred, not on a reachable code path, etc.
_fields.added: YYYY-MM-DD when the entry was added — REQUIRED
_fields.review: YYYY-MM-DD by which the entry must be re-evaluated — REQUIRED. An expired entry prints a CI warning but does not fail the job.
